ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Sequence name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "subjID" INTEGER /* Subject ID of the participant */,
  "startDate" TEXT /* Date the participant started the experiment */,
  "startTime" TEXT /* Time the participant started the experiment */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has signed a consent form */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "scene_description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  "scene_category" TEXT /* Category of the scene */,
  "scene_type" TEXT /* Type of the scene */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the scene is set up */,
  "setup_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for setting up the scene */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene the object belongs to */,
  "object_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the object belongs to */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the object is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the object */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the object */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_object_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_category_id") REFERENCES object_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_semantics" (
  "semantic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semantic connotation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "semantic_connotation" TEXT /* Semantic connotation of the object */,
  "semantic_type" TEXT /* Type of semantic connotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semantic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trialNum" INTEGER /* Trial number */,
  "scene" TEXT /* Scene of the trial */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image used in the trial */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object used in the trial */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the object */,
  "presentationSize" TEXT /* Size of the presentation */,
  "keyPress" TEXT /* Key press of the participant */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the participant */,
  "RT" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of the trial */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_scene FOREIGN KEY ("scene") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_object FOREIGN KEY ("object") REFERENCES objects ("object_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the rating trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "ratingTrialNum" INTEGER /* Rating trial number */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "thisRatingTrialFile" TEXT /* File name of the rating trial */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sequences_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "experimentTime" INTEGER /* Time of the experiment */,
  "totalTime" INTEGER /* Total time of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
